# function: ip_is_private

<!-- Edit here: this is the MarkdownDescription source for the burnham ip_is_private function. docs/functions/ip_is_private.md is generated from it by "go generate ./..."; do not edit the generated doc. -->

Returns `true` if the IP address is within a private, loopback, link-local, or CGNAT range (RFC1918, RFC6598, RFC4193, loopback, link-local).

## Example Usage

```terraform
// RFC 1918 + RFC 6598 (CGNAT) + RFC 4193 (ULA) + loopback + link-local.
output "internal" {
  value = provider::burnham::ip_is_private("100.64.0.1")
  // → true (CGNAT)
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
ip_is_private(ip string) bool
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `ip` (String) The IP address to check.
